/usr/bin/g++ -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage -O0 -g -Wdeprecated-declarations -fPIC -g -Wdeprecated-declarations -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -fprofile-arcs -ftest-coverage CMakeFiles/test_geodaid_contact_ledger.dir/ContactLedgerTest.cpp.o -o /Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp-cicd-testing/bin/test_geodaid_contact_ledger   -L/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/build/MOOS/MOOSGeodesy/lib ../../../../lib/libgtest_main.a -lgeodaid -lcontacts -lgeometry -lmbutil /Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/build/MOOS/MOOSGeodesy/lib/libMOOSGeodesy.dylib /Users/charlesbenjamin/moos-ivp/build/MOOS/MOOSCore/lib/libMOOS.a ../../../../lib/libgtest.a -lm
